basics.name: Yujin Bae
basics.label: M.S. Student in Robotics, KAIST
basics.summary: I am an M.S. student in the Robotics Program at KAIST, working at the intersection of computer vision and robotics. My research builds models that perceive and anticipate human behavior — across egocentric vision, human motion and trajectory prediction, and 3D-aware multi-modal LLMs. My goal is to give robots and autonomous vehicles a human-aware understanding of dynamic environments so they can act safely and reliably alongside people.

education.institution: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST)

Funded by Mirae Asset Exchange Scholarship

Data augmentation and sensor fusion for robust perception
Real-world deployment target in off-road terrain
